beats.narration_text: Sawubona — this is Liam, in for Bear. Today: claude-scout, the skill that reads books about Claude and finds the concepts that belong on screen — inside the Claude UI itself.

output: cap at 8 cards per book, ranked

beats.narration_text: The skill reads books whose names contain claude and writes one file per book — claude-explainer dot md. No scripts, no reference files beyond CLAUDE-BRAND dot md. The constraint is the filter: the Claude UI must be the set, not the backdrop.

The pipeline: read chapters of each claude-named book, skip frontmatter and exercises. Detect zones that pass the brand-fit test. Cap at eight cards. Write builder-ready cards ranked by strength. Report one summary line per book.

props.title: Read → detect → cap → card.

phases.label: DETECT
phases.note: 5 brand-fit types: workflow, skill, knob, anatomy, claim

phases.label: CAP
phases.note: ≤8 cards per book — fewer honest cards win

phases.label: CARD
phases.note: builder-ready format, source pointer required, stop here

props.footerNote: Overwrite claude-explainer.md (generated file). Dedupe against existing reel slugs.

beats.narration_text: Self-demo: scout claude-code-for-students, a book in this repo.

props.runningText: reading 10 chapters for claude brand-fit zones...
output: checking each zone against 5 brand-fit types

beats.narration_text: One candidate card from Chapter one — 'The Homework Quiz Gap.' The premise is a circulating claim: A-I-assisted practice scoring forty-eight percent higher produces students who score seventeen points lower on unassisted exams. The UI is the set: the ask is a claim check. Source is traced.

props.title: CARD C01 — claude-code-for-students
props.code:
## C01 — The Homework/Quiz Gap
- slug: homework-quiz-gap
- source: chapters/01-homework-quiz-gap.md
- premise: AI practice that scores 48% higher produces
  students 17 points lower on unassisted exams
- channel: claude (claim-check type)
- ask beat: command: 'check this claim: AI tools hurt retention'
  topic: 'HOMEWORK/QUIZ GAP · CLAIM CHECK'
- spine: ASK → experiment → gap data → why → VERDICT
- est length: 90s
claude-code-for-students: 1 candidate shown (8 max)

beats.narration_text: Mechanism one: the brand fit test. A zone earns a card only if the Claude UI is the set — not the backdrop. Workflow beats, skill demos, knob corrections, anatomy shots, claim checks. If the lesson can't land as callouts on one screen plus a typed ask, it routes elsewhere.

props.heading: The UI must be the set.
props.body: Five types pass: workflow beats, skill/prompt demos, knob corrections, anatomy shots, claim checks. General theory routes to sketch-explainer or math-explainer. Figure-shaped ideas route to figures. Claude-scout only takes what belongs on the composer screen.
props.quote: can the whole lesson land as callouts on one screen plus a typed ask?

beats.narration_text: Mechanism two: honest cards beat padded lists. The cap is eight per book — but a book may honestly yield two. Coverage is not the goal. Every card needs a source pointer into the chapter prose. No claim from vibes.

props.heading: Fewer honest cards win.
props.body: The eight-card cap prevents sprawl. The source-pointer requirement prevents vibes. A card without a traceable premise is not a card — it is a guess. Claude-scout's value is in the filter, not the count.
props.quote: Fewer honest cards beat padded lists — a book may legitimately yield 2.

beats.narration_text: Mechanism three: cards only. Claude-scout writes the card detailed enough that the builder can turn an approved one into a beat sheet with no further reading. But the boundary is absolute — no beat sheets, no audio, no renders, no publishing.

props.heading: The scout never crosses the gate.
props.body: The card carries the ask-beat command, the topic, the spine, the callouts, the register note, and the estimated length. That is enough for a builder. Writing beyond the card couples discovery to production and skips the human gate that sits between them.
props.quote: No beat sheets, no audio, no renders, no publishing.

beats.narration_text: Claude-scout: brand fit test, honest card cap, and an absolute stop before the gate. The human picks. The claude-explainer skill builds.

artifactLines: brand fit: UI must be the set, not the backdrop
honest cap: ≤8 cards, source-traced, no vibes
5 types: workflow, skill, knob, anatomy, claim-check

beats.narration_text: Your turn. Run claude-scout on any book with claude in the name. For each card it proposes: does the premise survive without the chapter? Can you type the ask into the composer right now?

props.runningText: does the premise survive without the chapter?
output: run on any book with 'claude' in its name
for each card: does the premise stand alone?
can you type the ask into the composer now?
if not — the card needs more source or a tighter scope

beats.narration_text: Claude, Finding. I'm Liam, in for Bear.
